overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia traversing a pristine alpine valley. The character crosses a shallow mountain river, follows a rocky trail through wildflower meadows and pine forests, and climbs two cascading waterfalls in a high-fidelity natural environment with dramatic lighting and detailed vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow mountain river crossing with rocky banks

events.description: character exits the shallow water onto the rocky riverbank

agents.ego_description: Geralt wades through the crystal-clear river toward the rocky shore, water splashing around his boots

entered.detail: shallow turquoise water with visible rocky riverbed
gravel and stone shore lined with wildflowers
dense evergreen trees covering the mountain slopes
dense evergreen trees covering the mountain slopes
tall mountain peak with snow visible against the sky
grass with red and yellow wildflowers
grass with red and yellow wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt standing in a shallow mountain river surrounded by alpine scenery. He walks forward through the clear turquoise water toward a rocky shore lined with colorful wildflowers, with dense pine forests and snow-capped mountains visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: waterfall becomes visible in the distance to the right
character begins climbing up the rocks beside the waterfall

agents.ego_description: Walking along the rocky trail toward the cascading waterfall, then climbing up the wet stones beside the rushing water

entered.detail: cascading white water falling down the rocky cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character follows the rocky riverbank as a majestic waterfall comes into view ahead. The trail leads directly to the base of the falls, where Geralt begins ascending the slippery rocks beside the thundering cascade, with mist rising from the impact zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with dappled sunlight

events.description: enters denser forest section with tree canopy overhead
exits forest into open area with river visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Walking steadily up the winding dirt trail through the pine forest, sunlight filtering through the branches

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through tall trees
tall evergreen trees close to the path
tall evergreen trees close to the path

segments.scene_description: Having climbed above the waterfall, the character enters a shaded forest trail with dense pine trees on both sides. Dappled sunlight filters through the canopy as he walks the winding path, eventually emerging to see the river again ahead, surrounded by wildflowers and rocky outcrops.

events.description: begins climbing up the waterfall rocks against the current
reaches the top of the waterfall and looks out over the valley

agents.ego_description: Carefully climbing up the cascading waterfall, stepping on wet rocks while water rushes around him, then pausing at the top to survey the landscape

entered.detail: powerful cascade flowing down rocky tiers with white water
steep stone face with patches of moss
steep stone face with patches of moss

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt approaching and climbing a second waterfall, navigating the rushing water as he ascends the rocky tiers. Upon reaching the top, he stands on the precipice overlooking the valley below, with the clear mountain pool at his feet and dramatic cliffs rising on either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a serene alpine riverbed through a dense forest and up two cascading waterfalls to a high mountain precipice. It begins with Geralt wading through clear turquoise water toward a rocky shore lined with wildflowers, with snow-capped peaks looming under a partly cloudy sky. As he follows the riverbank, the scene shifts toward the thundering base of a majestic waterfall, where the camera tracks his ascent up slippery rocks through rising mist. The path then leads into a shaded pine forest with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy before emerging once more into the open air. Finally, the camera follows him as he navigates the rushing tiers of a second waterfall, culminating in a wide view from the summit overlooking the valley and dramatic cliffs.
